1. download phantom at phantom.app
2. create or import your wallet
3. click the gear icon → developer settings → devnet
4. visit csliquid.xyz and click connect wallet

you're in.

csliquid.

what is USDC on devnet?

it's test USDC. not real money.

connect your wallet on csliquid.xyz and we airdrop test USDC straight to you so you can start trading immediately.

csliquid.

that's it.

→ testnet environment on solana

csliquid.

csliquid.

you don't need to own a single CS2 skin to trade on csliquid.

you just need an opinion on whether AWP Dragon Lore goes up or down.

that's all.

csliquid.

what is a perpetual future?

it's a contract that tracks the price of an asset forever. no expiry date.

you can go long (bet price goes up) or short (bet price goes down).

csliquid.

long = you think the price goes up.
short = you think the price goes down.

you can profit in both directions.

this is how the pros trade.

csliquid.

leverage on csliquid means you can control a bigger position with less capital.

10x leverage = $100 controls a $1,000 position.

more upside. more downside. use it carefully.

csliquid.

how to open a trade:

1. go to csliquid.xyz
2. connect phantom (devnet)
3. pick a market — AWP Index, AK-47 Index, etc.
4. choose long or short
5. set your size
6. click open position

csliquid.

liquidation = when your position loses so much the protocol closes it automatically.

always know your liquidation price before you enter.

manage your risk.

csliquid.

the AWP Index tracks the floor price of the AWP skin market on CS2.

long it if you think AWPs are going up.
short it if you think the market is overheated.

csliquid.

unrealized PnL = what your position is worth right now if you closed it.
realized PnL = what you actually made after closing.

check your portfolio tab to see both.

csliquid.

closing a position:

go to portfolio → find your open position → click close.

your PnL settles in devnet USDC instantly.

csliquid.

we have 5 index markets:
→ AWP Index
→ AK-47 Index
→ Knife Index
→ Glove Index
→ CS500 Index

each one tracks a different segment of the CS2 skin economy.

csliquid.

CS500 index = the top 500 most traded CS2 skins combined.

think of it like the S&P 500 but for CS2 skins.

csliquid.

you can also trade individual skin perps.

AWP Dragon Lore FN. AK-47 Wild Lotus. Karambit Doppler.

the rarest skins in CS2. now tradeable as perps.

csliquid.

funding rate = a small fee paid between longs and shorts to keep the perp price close to the real price.

if more people are long, longs pay shorts.
if more people are short, shorts pay longs.

csliquid.

the charts on csliquid show OHLCV candlesticks.

1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 1d timeframes.

read the chart. find your entry. trade.

csliquid.
